allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sqlite3; conn=sqlite3.connect\('/workspace/HumanVIZ/data/humanviz.db'\); print\('Tables:', conn.execute\('SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=\\"table\\"'\).fetchall\(\)\); conn.close\(\)")
Bash(sqlite3 /workspace/HumanVIZ/data/humanviz.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM entities WHERE type='opera_script'; SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT name\) as unique_names FROM entities WHERE type='opera_script';")
Bash(sqlite3 data/humanviz.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM entities WHERE type='opera_script';")

Bash(sqlite3 data/humanviz.db "SELECT json_extract\(attributes, '$.__source_collection'\) as collection, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM entities WHERE type='opera_script' GROUP BY collection ORDER BY cnt DESC;")

Bash(sqlite3 data/humanviz.db "SELECT json_extract\(attributes, '$.剧目类型'\) as play_type, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM entities WHERE type='opera_script' AND json_extract\(attributes, '$.剧目类型'\) IS NOT NULL AND json_extract\(attributes, '$.剧目类型'\) != '' GROUP BY play_type ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 30;")

Bash(sqlite3 data/humanviz.db "SELECT json_extract\(attributes, '$.时代背景'\) as era, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM entities WHERE type='opera_script' AND json_extract\(attributes, '$.时代背景'\) IS NOT NULL AND json_extract\(attributes, '$.时代背景'\) != '' GROUP BY era ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;")
Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/workspace/HumanVIZ/src/data/p3_frontend_data.json'\)\); print\(type\(d\), list\(d.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(d, dict\) else len\(d\)\)")
